S

setFont(Font) - Method in class fakejavax.swing.JLabel
Sets the font of the object according to the given Font object
setLayout(GridLayout) - Method in class fakejavax.swing.JPanel
Sets the layout manager to be the given GridLayout
setLayout(FlowLayout) - Method in class fakejavax.swing.JPanel
Sets the layout manager to be the given FlowLayout
setText(String) - Method in class fakejavax.swing.JTextField
Changes the field's text to be the provided String
